column4: Given a hypothetical outage with conflicting signals (latency spike, low CPU, elevated retries), derive a causal hypothesis tree, pick one highest-leverage intervention, and define falsifiable verification steps.
Design and implement a safe dual-write migration strategy for a schema split, including consistency checks, fallback behavior, and rollback checkpoints.
Write a strict contract for a risky API boundary, implement defensive parsing and validation, and verify behavior with focused pass/fail probes.
Refactor a fragile workflow into an explicit state machine with guarded transitions, invalid-state handling, and deterministic recovery paths.
Produce a measurable optimization plan that protects p95 latency and tail regressions under load without changing observable behavior.
Identify one high-impact security weakness class, implement a robust mitigation, and verify it with concrete before/after evidence.
Design and run a failure-injection drill for one dependency path, then harden retry/backoff/circuit behavior and validate recovery.
Resolve an intentionally ambiguous spec by stating assumptions, choosing a coherent implementation direction, and proving requirement coverage.
Contain a broad refactor into reversible increments, preserve behavior parity, and provide a validation matrix for each increment.
Audit run-trace quality for readability and signal density, then propose and apply improvements to reduce noise and improve fold summaries.
Teach a difficult subsystem with misconceptions, checks for understanding, and a mini mastery loop that includes retrieval prompts.
Run a safe attack-surface chain simulation (recon -> exploit hypothesis -> mitigation), then implement and verify the highest-value defensive fix.
